insight: `CompChatColor.convertLegacyToMini()` can fail to convert `§` codes when its `GENERIC_DOMAIN_PATTERN` falsely matches player text (e.g. `§f*in` triggers domain detection because `*` is a domain separator and `in` is a TLD). Surviving `§` codes crash MiniMessage with "Legacy formatting codes have been detected". The fix is stripping `§[code]` in `fromMiniNative()` before parsing.
